jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - FIITJEE - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the FIITJEE family as a Senior Teacher in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FIITJEE:
FIITJEE is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE!
